entry.name: innerGap
entry.label: Inner Gap
entry.whatsthis: Gap in pixels between adjacent tiled windows.

entry.name: outerGap
entry.label: Outer Gap
entry.whatsthis: Gap in pixels between tiled windows and the screen edge.

entry.name: ignoreClass
entry.label: Ignore Window Classes
entry.whatsthis: Comma-separated list of WM_CLASS values to never tile (case-insensitive substring match). Example: "plasmashell,krunner"

entry.name: ignoreName
entry.label: Ignore Window Names
entry.whatsthis: Comma-separated list of resource names to never tile (case-insensitive substring match).

entry.name: ignoreCaption
entry.label: Ignore Window Captions
entry.whatsthis: Comma-separated list of caption substrings to never tile (case-insensitive). Example: "Copied to clipboard,Picture-in-Picture"
